name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeValidationRunMatrix records per target execution status for future live transient cruise skew wake validation.
note: Primary run matrix layer for live cruise skew wake validation.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessGate controls whether live validation rows may become pending.
note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTemporalResolution supplies strict per target sample period and substep requirements.
note: Temporal constraint input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTransit supplies target wake speed pressure momentum and arrival time context.
note: Target physics input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeProbeMap supplies rotor resolved axial plane and lateral sweep probe identities.
note: Spatial probe identity input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies powered cruise source context for the skew wake validation target.
note: Powered source context input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live powered source transient cruise skew wake validation execution.
note: Upstream CFD target for live execution.
